div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Paraguay (Wheeler)
div.p: 41. Has the Paraguayan Government answered the notes sent to you by the Department’s cables of October 3?See footnote 86 and footnote 87, p. 757.

Department assumes from your 99, September 30, 8 p.m. and 101, October 7, 6 p.m.,Neither printed. that Paraguay accepts to be represented at the first meeting to consider the non-aggression pact on November 11.

Has any indication been given regarding Paraguayan response to the suggestion of the neutral representatives that forces in the Chaco be confined within the limits of their respective forts? Affirmative answers to these two notes will be very helpful at this time.
